# Portfolio Images

Drop your photos here with these exact filenames. Supported formats: `.jpg`, `.jpeg`, `.png`, `.webp`.

## Profile (Home page)

| File | Used on |
|------|---------|
| `profile.jpg` | Home — shown before About Me |
| `research/symposium.jpg` | Home — Research Presentation section |
| `endowments/zerve-hackathon.jpg` | Home — Latest Endowments (Zerve.ai card) |
| `endowments/isaac-rl-trajectory.jpg` | Home — Latest Endowments (RL Trajectory card) |
| `endowments/bev-cosmos-vla.jpg` | Home — Latest Endowments (BEV / Cosmos-R2 card) |
| `synthera/synthera-1.jpg` | Home — Project Highlight (left) |
| `synthera/synthera-2.jpg` | Home — Project Highlight (right) |
